task_description: crawl a public documentation site, collect internal links, identify orphan pages with no incoming links within the crawl, and save the results to JSON
code:
echo "Please provide the URL of the documentation site to crawl:"
read url
echo "Starting crawl of $url"
wget --spider -r -l 1 -np -nd -o wget_output.txt "$url"
